name: spotify-upsert-playlist
description: Create or update a recurring Spotify playlist by name. Replaces the tracks in an existing playlist with the same name instead of creating a duplicate. Use for daily/weekly mixes or any playlist that should be refreshed each run. For one-off new playlists, use spotify-create-playlist instead.

input.description: name is the playlist title (required). track_uris is a list of spotify:track:ID URIs (required). description and public are optional.

name.description: Playlist name — used to find an existing playlist to update, or as the name for a new one

track_uris.description: List of Spotify track URIs (spotify:track:ID) to set as the playlist contents

usage: POST /proxy/playlists/upsert {name, track_uris, description?, public?} → {playlist_id, created, track_count}
